case_title: XIM LIU VS. JIAN XING CHEN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, XIM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) SERVED MAR-16-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XING
ORDER CASED CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, XIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XING THE DENTAL WORK UNDERLYING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS DONE IN 2007. PLAINTIFF WAS AWARE OF PROBLEMS WITH THE DENTAL WORK IN 2010. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS TOO LATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED DEC-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XING
DECLARATION DEFENDANT CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, XIM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIU, XIM AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN XING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-04-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XIM LIU IS PRESENT IN PERSON AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER HSIN-JU 'AGNES' CHANG (#30126) REMOTELY VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT JIAN XING CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 1-20-23 IS IMPROPER. PLAINTIFF STATED DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER IN BUSINESS AT THE LOCATION. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE, COURT ASKS PLAINTIFF XIM LIU IF SHE WOULD NEED MORE TIME TO LOCATE AND SERVE THE DEFENDANT AND HER ANSWER IS NO. PLAINTIFF IS ADVISED IF NO PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE NEXT COURT DATE ON MAY-04, 2023, POSSIBLY COURT MAY ONLY ALLOW FOR ONE MORE CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO MAR-02-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XIM LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JIAN XING CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMS COURTROOM CLERK THAT CHINESE INTERPRETER WAS REQUESTED BY HER, BUT COURTROOM HAS NO RECORD OF THE REQUEST IN THE SYSTEM SO THIS IS A NEW REQUEST. (CANTONESE PREFERRED) COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR THE HEARING. DURING THE COURT PROCEEDING, COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF SPEAKS LIMITED ENGLISH AND NEEDS INTERPRETER SERVICE. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER AND ADVISED PLAINTIFF MAY ALSO BRING IN ONE FOR THE NEXT COURT DATE FOR BACKUP. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LIU, XIM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF XIM LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT JAIN XING CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
